score_components.formula_applied: N/A — Instructional content, not a performance evaluation

confidence_rationale: Video is clearly instructional/promotional material for MediSimu laparoscopic simulator products. No trainee is performing any FLS task; rather, the video showcases equipment, multiple task modules, demonstration environments, and product information through marketing and educational slides.
cannot_determine: Task identification — video shows all five FLS modules but is not a performance of any single task
Completion time — no individual task execution is timed
Penalty assessment — no performance metrics apply to promotional content
technique_summary: This is instructional/promotional content showcasing the MediSimu laparoscopic simulator product line. The video displays all five standard FLS/MISTELS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, intracorporeal suture) and demonstrates their integration into a complete training system. Equipment quality and completeness are highlighted.

demonstrated_techniques: Peg transfer task setup and mechanics (6 objects, bidirectional transfer)
Pattern cutting task with 4cm circular target
Endoloop deployment and cinching on foam appendage
Extracorporeal suture placement and knot tying on Penrose drain
Intracorporeal suture with multiple throws and cinching
Proper instrument handling with two-handed coordination

note: This video is a product demonstration and marketing presentation for MediSimu laparoscopic simulators. It does not represent a trainee or expert performing an FLS task for evaluation purposes. Scoring is not applicable. The video effectively showcases the simulator capabilities and intended use cases in training environments.
